module.name: no-literal-property-unions
module.description: Require property literal unions to use named domain types.

scenarios.name: should allow properties typed with enum or named type references
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature

scenarios.name: should ignore non-property literal unions
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the function parameter type

scenarios.name: should allow property unions without literal value members
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature

scenarios.name: should allow boolean property unions that cover the boolean domain
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature

scenarios.name: should report interface properties with string literal value options
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the property name

scenarios.name: should report type literal properties with string literal value options
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the property name

scenarios.name: should report class properties with string literal value options
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property definition
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the property name

scenarios.name: should report abstract class properties with string literal value options
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the abstract property definition
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the property name

scenarios.name: should report properties with number literal value options
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the property name

scenarios.name: should report properties with negative number literal value options
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the property name

scenarios.name: should report properties with bigint literal value options
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the property name

scenarios.name: should report properties with literal value options and nullish members
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the property name

scenarios.name: should report property unions with widened string members
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the property name

scenarios.name: should report property unions that mix boolean literals with other literal values
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the property name

scenarios.name: should report property unions with template literal value options
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the property signature
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the property name

scenarios.name: should report computed properties with literal value options
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the computed property definition
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the computed key

scenarios.name: should report private properties with literal value options
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the private property definition
scenarios.then: a noLiteralPropertyUnions violation is reported on the private property name
